description_long: This is a small, vintage-style biplane with a bright red fuselage and wings, featuring visible weathering and metallic rivet details along the body. The aircraft has two stacked wings supported by struts, a single propeller at the nose, and a fixed tailwheel undercarriage. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield and a single seat visible. The engine cowling is metallic and slightly worn, matching the utilitarian look of the landing gear and propeller. Decorative elements, such as curved metal trim and exposed bolts, give the plane a classic, almost toy-like appearance. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all painted red with signs of use.
description: A small, red, vintage biplane with an open cockpit, metallic propeller, and weathered details. Features stacked wings, fixed landing gear, and classic rivet accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual stacked wings, central propeller, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the open cockpit, curved fuselage, and visible rivet details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of both wings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the tailwheel, cockpit opening, and weathered wing surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, mid-fuselage, with a small windshield.
